title: A Wonderful Feat.
content:
I never walk along the street
        Because I haven't any feet;
     Nor is this strange when I repeat
        That I am but a garden beet.
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Wonderful Feat."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
